violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC informed to separate clean/dirty knives. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
Inspector observed rodenticide(pellets) throughout the establishment.PIC informed to remove pellets, wash, sanitize area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (knife holder, prep table, steam table ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (warewashing and office/storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
Inspector observed gnawed bags of rice. PIC elected to dispose of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

( Beans) was observed held at (120) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
Inspector observed a live cat. PIC informed to remove cat from premises. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the ( 3 bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, items, and clutter were observed in the (warewashing area, steam tables, and mop sink ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
Freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Live cat observed within facility. PIC informed to remove live animal. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Rice was observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Clothes and various items were observed stored in mop sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the warewashing area and on top of Steam table. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
